summary: Frontend testing of Map Page UI Restructure - Merging 'Go Live' flow into Map Pin Drawers. All 9 key features verified successfully. The UnifiedSpotDrawer component works correctly with 3 snap points (PEEK=120px, HALF=540px, FULL=918px), proper content visibility at each level, and correct role-based button visibility.

minor.issue: 404 Not Found - cosmetic only, video file missing

critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedSpotDrawer.js: Correctly implements 3 snap points (PEEK=120px, HALF=50vh, FULL=85vh)
UnifiedSpotDrawer.js line 151: isPhotographer conditional correctly hides 'Start Shooting' button for non-photographers
UnifiedSpotDrawer.js line 193: Surf Report only visible at HALF and FULL snap points
UnifiedSpotDrawer.js line 265: Session Settings only visible at FULL for photographers
MapPage.js: Global 'Go Live' button successfully removed from header (line 1129 comment confirms removal)
MapPage.js line 751: handleSpotClick properly clears previous drawer state before mounting new one
MapPage.js line 1418: UnifiedSpotDrawer integration with correct props (spot, isOpen, onClose, onStartShooting, etc.)
All data-testid attributes present: unified-spot-drawer, close-drawer-btn, start-shooting-btn, request-pro-btn
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map Page UI restructure verified. Key changes: (1) Global 'Go Live' button removed from header, (2) UnifiedSpotDrawer opens on map pin click with spot name, 'Start Shooting' button (photographers only), surf report, active shooters, (3) 3 snap points work correctly, (4) Close button removes drawer completely, (5) Filter tabs (All, Surf Spots, Photographers) and 'Request a Pro' remain in header.

go_live_removed.description: Global 'Go Live' button correctly REMOVED from map header - only filter tabs and Request a Pro remain

unified_drawer_opens_on_pin_click.description: Clicking map pin opens UnifiedSpotDrawer with spot name 'Jacksonville Beach Pier' and region

drawer_snap_points.description: 3 snap points work: PEEK (120px), HALF (540px with surf report visible), FULL (918px with all content)

chevron_expand_collapse.description: ChevronUp expands drawer through snap points, ChevronDown collapses back to PEEK

surf_report_at_half.description: Surf Report visible at HALF height - shows wave height (2.6ft), swell (1.8ft), tides, conditions

session_settings_at_full.description: Session Settings NOT visible at FULL for Pro Surfer (correct behavior - only for photographers)

close_button_works.description: X button (close-drawer-btn) completely removes drawer from DOM when clicked

start_shooting_visibility.description: 'Start Shooting' button NOT visible for Pro Surfer kelly@surf.com (isPhotographer=false)

filter_tabs_present.description: All filter tabs present: All (yellow), Surf Spots, Photographers, Request a Pro

ui_screenshots.drawer_half: 540px height with Surf Report, Current Conditions, Today's Tides
ui_screenshots.drawer_full: 918px height with all content including Active Shooters section

note: To test 'Start Shooting' button and Session Settings visibility, need a photographer user (role: Grom Parent, Hobbyist, Photographer, or Approved Pro)
